clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in newer JDKs/servers.
clean-architecture-example/db/src/main/j.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (e.g., Spring Boot 3.x, Tomcat 10+), which are standard for JDK 21 migrations.
